page.content: In the analysis of the experimental results, the differences in means were systematically evaluated to determine the effectiveness of the intervention under study. The table presented herein outlines the statistical metrics relevant to this evaluation, including the "Difference of the means" and "Standard deviation." The observed differences of means indicate the extent to which the intervention impacted the dependent variable, providing insights into its practical significance. Notably, a difference of 1.0 was found in one of the comparisons, which suggests a measurable effect, while a more substantial difference of 3.0 was observed in another group, underscoring the intervention's potential efficacy.

of the intervention under study. The table presented herein outlines the statistical metrics relevant to this evaluation, including
the "Difference of the means" and "Standard deviation." The observed differences of means indicate the extent to which the
intervention impacted the dependent variable, providing insights into its practical significance. Notably, a difference of 1.0 was

page.content: Moreover, the "Standard deviation" values associated with these differences offer critical insight into the variability of the data, illustrating the consistency of the results across different trials. Understanding the power of the study, reported to be 99%, further emphasizes the robustness of these findings, indicating a very low probability of Type II error. This high power level ensures that the results are statistically significant and reliable, reinforcing the validity of the conclusions drawn from the analysis. Overall, the data presented in the table contributes to a comprehensive understanding of the intervention's impact on the target variable.
